info.title: AdviceOfCharge
info.description: This is Swagger specification for the Advice of Charge Management.

post.description: This task pattern operation is for creating Advice of Charge entities.

parameters.name: Ignored-Warning
parameters.description: To store warning message IDs in comma separated string that will be ignored by the server

Ignored-Warning.description: To store warning message IDs in comma separated string of same API call that have been successfully ignored in server

400.description:
Bad Request If the processing is not successful, the response will be included information about error code and short description of error. The error in the response will be indicative of the first occurrence of problem seen in the flow of processing. The processing stops at the first occurrence of the error. System errors will need to be investigated by Operations team. For the error scenarios caused by incorrect data, the sender may send the request again with correct data. The error cases listed in this section assume that the incoming request has passed schema validation. The listed error messages are known messages from validation and other logic specific to this resource and method, as well as messages that apply across all Singleview APIs. It should include all error messages that relate to the input parameters of a request or current state of a given resource. However, it cannot be considered comprehensive as it does not include errors that could occur due to system level issues (process failure, database failure) or other failures that typically result in a 5xx error code being returned.
Error CodeError MessageError CauseError Action
<E83569> 'Search type <1:Field>' is not supported in API caching system'.
Cause:   The given search type is not supported in API caching system.Action:  Specify correct search type.
<E84102> At least <1:Field> or <2:Field> must be provided for the request.
Cause:   At least one of the two fields must be supplied.Action:  Populate one of the two fields or both.
<E23208> Interface definition of type 'Quote' cannot be determined.Cause: Interface definition of type 'Quote' cannot be found or more than 1 exist.
Action: Ensure there is only 1 interface definition of type 'Quote'.
<E06611> The mandatory parameter <1:Parameter> is not specified.Cause: A mandatory parameter is missing.
Action: Add the mandatory parameter.
<E84129> <error>Cause: General Error
Action: Unknown
<E83539> Account Number '<1:Field1>' does not exist in the System.Cause: Incorrect parameter value specified.
Action: Specify correct value.
<E83553> The <1:Entity> provided is invalid.Cause: The corresponding value must be in accordance to JSON specification file.
Action: Please refer to respective JSON specification file accordingly.
<E00001> Enter the <1:field name>, this information is mandatory
Cause: The specified field requires a value to be entered into it.
Action: Enter a value into the field before moving to another record or another block.
You can display/run other forms if necessary before entering a value.

<E08502> Operation Failed: <1:Details>Cause: A dbanalyze sql operation has failed
Action: Determine problem cause from displayed SQL text
<E111503> The indexes of table <1:table> are not compatible with search sequence table <2:srchseqtable>: <3:DATerror>Cause: The table provided does not have the same number of index columns as the search sequence table has result columns. This could be due to incorrect configuration of either the table or the search sequence table, or the table name or search sequence table name provided is not the correct one.
Action: Verify the table and search sequence table names, and/or the configuration of each. Correct the names and/or the incorrect configuration.
<E84129> <error>Cause: General Error
Action: Unknown
<E81210> Adjustment Insertion AdjustmentInsert& FailedCause: Adjustment Insertion Failed
Action: Provide correct details.
<CA-45571>The Case is no longer open. Please re-open the Case or create a new Case.Cause: The Case is no longer open.Action: Reopen the Case or create a new Case.
<OE-45626>There is no contact selected for the case. A contact and customer must be selected for the case before you can create a sales order.Cause: There is no contact selected for a new Sales Order.Action: Please select a contact and customer before creating a new Sales Order.
<OE-45243>A {1:Translate} can not be created for a customer with a status of {2:Translate}. Cause: An order can not be created when the customer status is cancelled ro black-listed.Action: Not Defined
<OE-45820>Feature '{1:Translate}' requires a Cancellation Reason and the general field to update is not set.
Please contact your system administrator to rectify this problem.		Cause: The fact AB_CancelReasonGeneralColumn_I on the Product_Definition class is not set for the feature being removed.Action: Contact your System Administrator
<OE-45821>A feature requiring a Cancellation Reason has already been removed on this order so the Cancellation Reason cannot be cleared.Cause: The user attempted to clear the Cancellation Reason field, however a feature has already been cancelled and it's Cancellation Reason has been set. Action: Select a Cancellation Reason.
<OE-45757>For the current Effective Date of {1} the selected product has an Effective End Date of {2} and is therefore not the most current version of the product.
Please select another product or cancel the current request and update the Effective Date to be after {2}.		Cause: Only the lastest version of the product can be updated. For your current Effective Date, there is a later version of this product.Action: Please select another product or cancel the current request and update the Effective Date to be after {2}.
<OE-45030>Please update the required product, feature, service, or service list.Cause: No product, feature, service, or service list has been updated before saving the order.Action: Please update the base product, feature, service, or a service list before saving the order.
<OE-45756>Please select a new number to assign.Cause: A new equipment item must be selected before this order can be saved..Action: Please select a new number before saving the order.
<OE-45749>Select Service is a mandatory field.Cause: Service was not selected and product to transfer is not defined.Action: Please select a service to define a product to transfer.
<OE-45747>Transfer Customer is a mandatory field.Cause: No customer has been selected to transfer the product to.Action: Please select a customer to transfer the product to.
<OE-45748>Reason For Transfer is a mandatory field.Cause: No Reason For Transfer has been selected.Action: Please Select a Reason For Transfer.
<OE-45869>The order cannot be submitted until all Contract Documents are Uploaded.Cause: The order is going to be submitted but the Contract Documents are yet to be uploaded.Action: Please upload all the associated Contract Document and try again.
<OE-45767>No updates have been made to the product or any of its components.
Please update some component of the product or cancel the order.		Cause: No product, feature, service, or service list updates have been made before submitting the order.Action: Please update some component of the order or cancel the order.
<OE-48014>Auto Renewal is not allowed to update.Cause: Auto Renewal attribute cannot be updated as it is set to 'N/A' by auto purchase/third party purchase process.Action: Do not update Auto renewal attribute when it is purchased by auto purchase/third party purchase process.
<OE-45746>A Cancellation Reason is required for feature '{1:Translate}' that is being removed.Cause: A Cancellation Reason has not been selected on the Order.Action: Select a Cancellation Reason.
<GEN-45146>The new {1:Translate} entered ({2}), cannot be greater than the current End Date ({3}).Cause: Not DefinedAction: Not Defined
<GEN-45145>The new Start Date entered ({1}), cannot be less than the current Start Date ({2}).Cause: Not DefinedAction: Not Defined
<OE-45753>Service specific offer {1:Translate} is not linked to a service of type {2:Translate}.Cause: Product Offer must be linked to a service with specific service type(s).Action: Please select a service specific type(s) and link to the offer.
<OE-45792>Site Address details must be entered.Cause: All customer Site Address fields are blank.
A quote cannot be generated or the customer updates applied with these fields blank.		Action: Enter customer Site Address details
<OE-45233>There are no updates to apply.
Update a customer field before applying the updates.		Cause: The values updated before the quote was generated have been reset to the customer's current values hence there are no updates to apply.Action: Update the customer with the same values used when the quote was generated before applying the updates.
The quote can be also be regenerated if required.
<PR-45230>You cannot perform a Product {2:Translate} when a {1:Translate} is also being added or updated.Cause: A product's subcomponents cannot be added or updated at the same time as the product status is being changed or the product is being transferred to another customer.Action: Perform the product update and save, then add or update the product's subcomponents.
<CU-45790>The customer cannot be a Parent Customer for itself.Cause: Not DefinedAction: Not Defined
<CU-45211>The New Parent Customer is the same as the existing Parent Customer.Cause: Not DefinedAction: Not Defined
<CU-45212>The hierarchy move effective date ({1}) cannot be less then the effective date ({2}) of the customer to be moved.Cause: Not DefinedAction: Not Defined
<CU-45215>Cannot move customer as it have been either 'Blacklisted' or 'Cancelled' during the move period. Cause: Not DefinedAction: Not Defined
<CU-45216>Cannot move customer as the new parent customer has either been 'Blacklisted' or 'Cancelled' during the move period.Cause: Not DefinedAction: Not Defined
<PR-45229>This product is not available for Customer Type {1:Translate}Cause: Not DefinedAction: Not Defined
<PAY-45443>Card Type is a mandatory field.Cause: Not DefinedAction: Not Defined
<GEN-45449>Invalid Credit Card Number. Please enter {1} digits.Cause: Invalid number of digits for the credit card number for the selected card type.Action: Enter the correct number of digits
<CU-45636>An invalid character was entered in the Credit Card Number field. Valid numbers are required.Cause: An invalid character was entered in the Credit Card Number field.Action: Please enter a valid credit card number.
<GEN-45450>Invalid Credit Card Number.Cause: Validation of the credit card number failed as per international numbering schemeAction: Not Defined

get.summary: Retrieves Advice of Charges by Order ID.
get.description: This operation retrieves Advice of Charges entity through its Order ID. Attribute selection is enabled for all first level attributes.

parameters.description: Comma-separated properties to provide in response

400.description:
Bad Request If the processing is not successful, the response will be included information about error code and short description of error. The error in the response will be indicative of the first occurrence of problem seen in the flow of processing. The processing stops at the first occurrence of the error. System errors will need to be investigated by Operations team. For the error scenarios caused by incorrect data, the sender may send the request again with correct data. The error cases listed in this section assume that the incoming request has passed schema validation. The listed error messages are known messages from validation and other logic specific to this resource and method, as well as messages that apply across all Singleview APIs. It should include all error messages that relate to the input parameters of a request or current state of a given resource. However, it cannot be considered comprehensive as it does not include errors that could occur due to system level issues (process failure, database failure) or other failures that typically result in a 5xx error code being returned.
Error CodeError MessageError CauseError Action
<E83569> 'Search type <1:Field>' is not supported in API caching system'.
Cause: The given search type is not supported in API caching system.Action: Specify correct search type.
<E84108> '<1:Field>' '<2:Value>' does not exist in the System or the user does not have security access to record that match the search criteria for '<3:Action>' of '<4:Entity>'.
Cause: Either entity not found in the system or User does not have access to the search entity.Action: Specify correct entity value or get the access to the entity.
<E84102> At least <1:Field> or <2:Field> must be provided for the request.
Cause: At least one of the two fields must be supplied.Action: Populate one of the two fields or both.
<E83500> No valid entry in the DA table '<1:TableName>' for the given index <2:Index> as of <3:Date>.
Cause: No valid entry in the DA as of the given date.Action: Provide a valid entry in the DA.
<E84106> Missing '<1:Element>' element in the request.
Cause: Element mentioned in the error message is missing from the request.Action: Specify element value specified in the error message.
<E84107> The <1:Entity> provided is invalid.
Cause: The Entity provided is invalid.Action: Specify the valid entity value.
<E83562> The parameter field name '<1:Field1>' is invalid.
Cause: The corresponding value must be in accordance to Swagger specification file.Action: Please refer to respective Swagger specification file accordingly.
<E83559> The value <1:Entity> of fields provided is invalid.
Cause: The corresponding value must be in accordance to Swagger specification file.Action: Please refer to respective Swagger specification file accordingly.

Bad Request If the processing is not successful, the response will be included information about error code and short description of error. The error in the response will be indicative of the first occurrence of problem seen in the flow of processing. The processing stops at the first occurrence of the error. System errors will need to be investigated by Operations team. For the error scenarios caused by incorrect data, the sender may send the request again with correct data. The error cases listed in this section assume that the incoming request has passed schema validation. The listed error messages are known messages from validation and other logic specific to this resource and method, as well as messages that apply across all Singleview APIs. It should include all error messages that relate to the input parameters of a request or current state of a given resource. However, it cannot be considered comprehensive as it does not include errors that could occur due to system level issues (process failure, database failure) or other failures that typically result in a 5xx error code being returned.

Characteristic.description: Describes a given characteristic of an object or entity through a name/value pair.

unit.description: Currency (ISO4217 norm uses 3 letters to define the currency).

Money.description: A base / value business entity used to represent money

id.description: Unique identifier of the associated product offering price Introductory offering price id. Batch MRC -> offerId-productId-Intro, Realtime Periodic -> offerId-productId-Intro/offerId-productId-entCatCode-Intro, Deposit -> offerId-productId-Int/offerId-productId-entCatCode-Int

relationshipType.description: type of the relationship, for example override, discount, etc. Batch MRC and Realtime Periodic -> IntroductoryDiscount, Deposit -> DepositInterest

ProductOfferingPriceRelationship.description: Describes a non-composite relationship between product offering prices. For example one price might be an discount alteration for another price.

href.description: Reference of the related entity - <http://<HOSTNAME>:<PORT>/<Customer/individual URL>/<CUSTOMER_NODE_TRE_V.CUSTOMER_NODE_ID or PERSON_TRE_V.PERSON_ID>

@referredType.description: The actual type of the target instance. Possible Values: customer, individual

RelatedParty.description: RelatedParty reference. A related party defines party linked to a specific entity.

id.description: Unique identifier of a related entity. SV_MAPPING: SERVICE_TYPE.SERVICE_TYPE_ID

ServiceRef.description: Service reference. Service linked to a specific entity

id.description: Identifier of an instance of the resource. Required to be unique within the resource type.  Used in URIs as the identifier for specific instances of a type. - SV_MAPPING:EQUIPMENT_TRE_V.EQUIPMENT_ID

category.description: Category of the resource. e.g Gold, Silver for the resource, SV_MAPPING:EQUIPMENT_TRE_V.EQUIPMENT_SUBTYPE

ResourceRef.description: Resource reference. Resource linked to a specific entity

ProductStatusType.description: Possible values for the status of the product

realizingResource.description: Details of resources provided for activityType such as Sales Order, Alter Product, MSISDN Change, SIM Change and Terminate Subscription.

realizingService.description: Details of service provided for activityType such as Sales Order, Alter Product and Terminate Subscription.

productCharacteristic.description: Characteristic name supported: CancelReasonCode, ReasonCode, RelatedProductOrderId.

ProductRefOrValue.description: A product/order deatils to get AoC pricing details

AdviceOfChargeItem.description: A advice of Charge item - defines product/resource in order to get pricing elements.

tax.description: An amount of money levied on the price of a Product by a legislative body.

taxRate.description: Applied rate of the tax. tax.vat.dTaxRate->Tax

TaxItem.description: A tax item is created for each tax rate and tax type used in the bill.

priceType.description: A category that describes the price.

id.description: Unique identifier of AoC price type.

productInstId.description: Product Instance Id. Mandatory for negotiatedAdvicOfCharge API

overrideFlag.description: Indicates the item price can be overridden or not.

characteristic.description: Characteristic name supported: SequenceNo, LastUpdate, DisplayInCC, TaxInclusive.

popRelationship.description: Product Offering Prices related to this Product Offering Price, for example an introduct discount price, deposit interest

chargePeriod.description: Indicates the duration for the charge. SV_MAPPING: OrderQuote.ChargePeriod_X

productOfferName.description: Top Level Offer name. SV_MAPPING: OrderQuote.QuoteOfferName_X

billDate.description: Date when bill is generated. SV_MAPPING: OrderQuote.ChargeDate_T

aocPrice.description: Price list for the specified order item/activity.

AdviceOfCharge.description: Lists the advice of charges which will be used for service, product acquisition or modification.

activityType.description: This is used to identify the AoC activity type.

relatedParty.description: A reference to a party playing a role in this advice of charge(customer, party etc.)

AdviceOfCharge_Create.description: It used to retrieve advice of charges which will be used for service, product acquisition or modification.

href.description: Reference of the case - <http://<PEREST_HOSTNAME>:<PEREST_PORT>/<case PEREST URL>/Case.ObjectKey>

status.description: The Status of Case, Possible Values New/Open/Closed. SV_MAPPING:Case.Status

name.description: The name of the case, SV_MAPPING:Case.Name

CaseRef.description: The Case data structure. case id (no need for status, href, name) can be passed to track changes against case. If case id is not passed then case would be created.

NegotiatedAdviceOfCharge.description: It represents the negotiated advice of charge API response structure

historyRequired.description: An indicator for creating a price change history record

relatedParty.description: A reference to a party playing a role in this advice of charge(customer, party etc.)

NegotiatedAdviceOfCharge_Create.description: It is used to update the negotiated advice of charges.

code.description: Application relevant detail, defined in the API or a common list.

reason.description: Explanation of the reason for the error which can be shown to a client user.

message.description: Details information related to the error which can be shown to a client user.

action.description: Corrective actions for the error which can be shown to a client user.

referenceError.description: URI of documentation describing the error.

@baseType.description: When sub - classing, this defines the super - class.

@schemaLocation.description: A URI to a JSON - Schema file that defines additional attributes and relationships

@type.description: 'Error' indicates that the error message is of server error message, 'Warning' indicates that the error message is of server warning message

Error.description: Used when an API throws an Error, typically with a HTTP error response - code(3xx, 4xx, 5xx)

ErrorParam.description: Represents error parameters that are used in the construction of the error message.
